Web Development.description: Building and maintaining websites and web applications.

Full Stack Development.description: Developing both client and server software.

AI/ML.description: Building intelligent systems that learn from data and automate decisions.

Data Science.description: Extracting insights and knowledge from structured and unstructured data.

Cybersecurity.description: Protecting systems, networks, programs, and data from digital attacks.

Networking.description: Designing, implementing, and managing computer networks.

Cloud Computing.description: Managing and delivering computing services over the Internet.

DevOps.description: Unifying software development and software operation for fast delivery.

Blockchain.description: Developing secure, decentralized ledger systems and smart contracts.

IoT.description: Connecting physical objects to the internet to collect and share data.

Embedded Systems.description: Designing specialized computer systems that perform dedicated functions within larger systems.

AR/VR.description: Creating immersive virtual and augmented reality experiences.

UI/UX.description: Designing user interfaces and user experiences to make software easy and delightful to use.

Product Management.description: Guiding the life cycle of a product from conception to launch and optimization.

Quantum Computing.description: Developing algorithms and software for quantum computers.

Bioinformatics.description: Applying computer science and statistics to biological data like genetics.

FinTech.description: Building modern financial technologies, payment processors, and banking systems.

HealthTech.description: Creating technology-driven solutions for healthcare systems and patient care.
